flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Withlacoochee Technical College fell 42% between 2006 and 2009 (80.7% → 47.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Withlacoochee Technical College fell 28% between 2021 and 2024 (384 → 278).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 24 pp at Withlacoochee Technical College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (50.4% vs 74.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Withlacoochee Technical College rose 15% between 2000 and 2003 ($1.4k → $1.6k).
